title: SQL: HAVING clause quirks
poc: select name from tables group by name having 1=1;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 100.50), (2, 'Bob', NULL), (3, 'Charlie', 200.00);
SELECT name FROM test_table HAVING value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name FROM test_table GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(id) > 0;
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE value < 150 HAVING 1=1;
